'''Celida Noerr''' was an agent of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] infiltrating the [[Imperial Institute of Higher Studies]] on [[Ferrhast]]. There she befriended the ambitious [[Shandria L'hnnar]]. Together with Shandria, Celida broke into the [[Memory bank/Legends|databanks]] of the institute, and there she revealed to Shandria the brutal truth about many of the evil deeds of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. As a result, Celida was arrested. Shandria subsequently joined the Alliance.<ref name="OOAK" />
